statement.sub: Users should feel like they're using magic, not software.

support_page.title: Support Center
setup_steps: Download Translay from the App Store
Open Translay and select your target language
Go to Settings → Accessibility → Touch → Back Tap
Set "Double Tap" to the Translay shortcut
In any app, double-tap the back of your iPhone to translate

faqs.a: Translay uses the DeepL translation engine for high-quality translations across 15+ languages. Try the AI follow-up feature for more accurate understanding.
Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Russian, German, French, Spanish, and 15+ mainstream languages with more being added.
The free version provides 5 translations and 5 AI questions per day. Quotas reset daily. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited use.
Please check: 1) Network connection 2) Back Tap shortcut is set correctly 3) Try reopening the Translay app.
Go to iPhone Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions to manage or cancel your Translay Pro subscription.
